task_completion.description: Open Wondershare EdrawMax and create a Gantt chart
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Wondershare EdrawMax application window is open, displaying a Gantt chart interface with a task list on the left and a timeline on the right.

task_completion.description: Set the chart title to 'Oracle to PostgreSQL Migration'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Oracle to PostgreSQL Migration' is visible as the title of the chart or the main project name.

task_completion.description: Add Phase 1 and Phase 2 with correct durations and start times
task_completion.visual_evidence: The task list includes 'Assessment & Planning' (or similar) and 'Schema Conversion'. Their timeline bars should reflect 2 weeks starting at Week 1, and 3 weeks starting at Week 3, respectively.

task_completion.description: Add Phase 3 and Phase 4 with correct durations and start times
task_completion.visual_evidence: The task list includes 'ETL Development' and 'Data Migration'. Their timeline bars should reflect 4 weeks starting at Week 4, and 3 weeks starting at Week 8, respectively.

task_completion.description: Add Phase 5 and Phase 6 with correct durations and start times
task_completion.visual_evidence: The task list includes 'UAT Testing' and 'Go-Live & Support'. Their timeline bars should reflect 3 weeks starting at Week 10, and 2 weeks starting at Week 13, respectively.
A save dialog shows the file being saved as 'migration_gantt.eddx' in /home/ga/, or the EdrawMax title bar displays 'migration_gantt.eddx'.
An export dialog shows the file being saved as 'migration_gantt.png' in /home/ga/, or a file manager/image viewer shows the exported PNG file.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax GUI to create the chart
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking and typing within the EdrawMax interface to add tasks and adjust timelines, rather than running a script to generate the file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with Wondershare EdrawMax
integrity.visual_evidence: The application being used must clearly be Wondershare EdrawMax, not a generic text editor or a different diagramming tool.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax export functionality to create the PNG
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent using the 'Export' or 'Save As' menu in EdrawMax to generate the PNG, rather than using a terminal screenshot tool or ImageMagick.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output files: /home/ga/migration_gantt.eddx and /home/ga/migration_gantt.png. Required text in the chart: 'Oracle', 'PostgreSQL', 'Assessment', 'Planning', 'Schema', 'Conversion', 'ETL', 'Data Migration', 'UAT', 'Go-Live'.
